title: Support PRIM_BUFIF1 primitive, fixes #2981
body:
This add support for bufif0, bufif1, notif0 and notif1 when used in Verific.

Difference between these two on Verific side is only in case:

```
              input     output
PRIM_TRI        Z         Z 
PRIM_BUFIF1     Z         X 

```
code_blocks:
input     output
PRIM_TRI        Z         Z 
PRIM_BUFIF1     Z         X
